articles.title: South Korea’s SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in record-breaking US IPO - Al Jazeera
articles.description: South Korean chip giant makes largest-ever debut by a foreign firm in the US, eclipsing Alibaba’s 2014 IPO.

articles.title: Stock futures dip after chip-led rally; SoftBank soars 11% as Asia tech stocks rise: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Wall Street is coming off a winning day, following a jump in chipmakers and falling oil prices.

articles.title: Fed chief taps Trump ally Marc Andreessen to advise on how AI reshapes work - The Washington Post
articles.description: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh named venture capitalist Marc Andreessen to co-lead a task force on AI's economic impact — a technology his firm has bet billions on.

articles.description: OpenAI’s Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company’s AGI chief and is transitioning to being a “part-time advisor.”

articles.description: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

articles.title: 'Sign the Damn Bill!' Anger at Trump Grows as US Housing Prices Hit All-Time High - Common Dreams
articles.description: President Trump refuses to sign bipartisan housing legislation as home prices hit record high. Housing supply shortage remains a major barrier.

articles.title: Millions of prescription eye drops recalled nationwide over contamination concerns - Fox Business
articles.description: Patients are urged to check affected lot numbers after the FDA classified Lupin's voluntary recall of prescription steroid eye drops a Class II action

articles.title: Disney+ President Alisa Bowen Exits to Join Fubo as CEO - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: The executive succeeds David Gandler and follows the sports-first streamer merging with Disney’s Hulu With Live TV.

articles.title: Taco Bell Is No Longer Selling These 5 Menu Items After Parasite Outbreak Causes ‘Explosive Diarrhea’ - Allrecipes
articles.description: A Taco Bell in Michigan has pulled lettuce, cilantro, onion, pico de gallo, and guacamole from its menu amid a multistate outbreak of cyclosporiasis.

articles.title: Why AstraZeneca Crashed 6%, Leading Two Rivals, Including Pfizer, To Jump - Investor's Business Daily
articles.description: AstraZeneca stock crashed Thursday after its Ionis-partnered treatment for a rare heart disease failed in Phase 3 testing.

articles.title: The VW Group Is Gutting Its Lineup. Up To Half Its Models Could Die - Motor1.com
articles.description: The Volkswagen Group plans to reduce the model lineup by as much as 50 percent. The number of options will decrease by up to 75 percent.

articles.description: The new model automatically includes public profiles to be used in generative AI creations.

articles.title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1 - TechCrunch
articles.description: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.

articles.title: Trump clean energy rollbacks erase $68B in US investment - Electrek
articles.description: A new analysis from E2 says canceled US clean energy projects have wiped out nearly 470,000 jobs and $68 billion in investment.

articles.title: Judge doesn't like Elon Musk settlement with SEC, but says court can't block it - Ars Technica
articles.description: Judge reluctantly approves $1.5M settlement with SEC over Twitter stock violation.
